1.name: MoveDNA Buyer Assessment
1.webTitle: Beyond the Bedrooms and Baths: Discover Your Buyer MoveDNAâ¢
1.introText: Real estate isn't just a financial transaction - itâs a psychological one. Take our 3-minute behavioral assessment to uncover your dominant real estate buyer archetype.
questions: I evaluate properties primarily using historical appreciation, market trends, and verifiable metrics. || typeA
I can easily look past outdated cosmetics or ugly wallpaper to imagine a home's aesthetic potential. || typeB
I view the real estate market like a high-stakes chess match where speed, efficiency, and leverage win. || typeC
It is vital to me that my co-buyers, family, and the community feel completely aligned and harmonious. || typeD
I care deeply about immaculate structural mechanics and thorough inspection report validation. || typeA
Finding a home that serves as an authentic expression of my personal identity and vision is a top priority. || typeB
I am completely unfazed by fast-moving markets or aggressive multiple-offer bidding scenarios. || typeC
I would rather take a slow, consultative approach than rush a process and risk relationship friction. || typeD
I have a high susceptibility to "analysis paralysis" because I prefer 100% factual certainty. || typeA
I am highly willing to purchase a "diamond in the rough" and manage cosmetic contractor updates. || typeB
I value transaction velocity, clean terms, and getting straight to the point over extended deliberation. || typeC
I actively avoid contract confrontations and want all parties in a deal to feel respected and heard. || typeD
A property's financial track record and risk mitigation outweigh its emotional or historical charm. || typeA
When touring a home, I focus entirely on the future lifestyle memories we can build inside its space. || typeB
I am hyper-decisive under pressure and expect immediate response times from my advisory team. || typeC
A home's day-to-day community integration and local neighborhood feel are its most critical parameters. || typeD

2.name: MoveDNA Seller Assessment
2.webTitle: Beyond the Bedrooms and Baths: Discover Your Seller MoveDNAâ¢
2.introText: Real estate isn't just a financial transaction - itâs a psychological one. Take our 3-minute behavioral assessment to uncover your dominant real estate seller archetype.
questions: I evaluate my property's market value strictly through absorption rates, hard data, and local comps. || typeA
My home holds significant personal history and treasured memories that I want a new buyer to honor. || typeB
I am fully bought into high-end staging and aggressive marketing to intentionally trigger a massive bidding war. || typeC
Minimizing daily lifestyle disruption, showings, and open house chaos is more important to me than fighting for every penny. || typeD
I demand a systematic, objective listing timeline backed by meticulous home maintenance files. || typeA
It matters immensely to me that my home transitions to a worthy caretaker who genuine appreciates its craftsmanship. || typeB
My ultimate objective is shattering local neighborhood price records and maximizing my net proceed check. || typeC
I strongly dislike intrusive showings, complex buyer repair lists, and unpredictable closing schedules. || typeD
I tend to discount psychological staging, assuming buyers evaluate homes purely on a cold square-footage calculation. || typeA
I believe my home's architectural character and unique soul are worth a substantial premium over generic area comps. || typeB
I am highly competitive and completely comfortable navigating tooth-and-nail contract updates or inspections. || typeC
I want a quiet, seamless, white-glove listing process that completely shields my daily routine from transaction stress. || typeD
I treat the sale of my property strictly as a logical liquidation of an asset rather than an emotional farewell. || typeA
I want a rich, narrative-driven marketing layout that showcases the unique history and soul of our house. || typeB
I view my home as a product to be aggressively staged, optimized, and masterfully negotiated for pure ROI leverage. || typeC
I would gladly accept highly certain, pre-vetted or off-market corporate terms quickly just to bypass transaction friction. || typeD
